ssr_ttfb_p95_ms.description: SSR response time from request start to first byte for the primary page route.

hydration_p95_ms.description: Time until all Mandu islands are hydrated on the client.

initial_js_bundle_kb.description: Transferred JavaScript payload needed for the first screen.

hmr_latency_p95_ms.description: Time from a source edit to browser-visible hot update in dev mode.

route_scan_p95_ms.description: Route discovery and manifest generation latency for the active project.

resource_generation_p95_ms.description: Resource generation latency for representative CRUD/resource workloads.

scenarios.notes: Current official demo baseline entry. Active app path verified against demo/todo-app. HTTP metrics frozen from a local Windows run on 2026-05-01; hydration remains unsupported because browser launch failed.
Production-mode budget for the first official reference path. HTTP metrics frozen from a local Windows run on 2026-05-01; hydration remains unsupported because browser launch failed.
Official hello SSR reference path, backed by the existing demo/starter app. HTTP metrics frozen from a local Windows run on 2026-05-01; hydration remains unsupported because browser launch failed.

Contract/resource-heavy reference scenario backed by demo/todo-app until a dedicated blog CRUD app exists. HTTP, route-scan, and resource-generation metrics frozen from a local Windows run on 2026-05-01; hydration remains unsupported because browser launch failed.

Expanded manual gate. Runs the hybrid island subset from scripts/hmr-bench.ts; excluded from default perf:ci because watcher timings are slower and more host-sensitive. Baseline frozen from a local Windows run on 2026-05-01.

notes: Budgets are enforced ceilings. Baselines define the frozen historical value for active scenarios.
P0-F-0 reconnects active scenarios to real demo directories; P0-F-2 fills active baseline values.
P1 promotes starter and todo-app into broader reference scenarios. Manual scenarios are runnable by id but excluded from default perf:ci.
